texto: When you really love someone, you think about him all the time. No matter where you are or what you're doing, he never completely leaves your thoughts. When you're apart, you want to be with him. When you're together, you're conscious of every move he makes, every word he says, and every breath he takes. Just the sight of him makes your heart rae and your mouth go dry. And when he touches you, the rest of the world disappears.
explicacao: Citação de Betsy Brannon Green sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “When you really love someone, you think about him all the time.
